message:
refactor: complete rusqlite extirpation — frankensqlite everywhere

Production code (src/): zero rusqlite references. All database operations
use frankensqlite natively. Moved rusqlite to dev-dependencies only
(retained for C-SQLite interop testing in compat gate tests).

Test code: migrated all test files from rusqlite API patterns to
frankensqlite equivalents (execute_compat, query_row_map, get_typed,
FrankenConnection, FrankenTransaction).

Files migrated:
- src/storage/sqlite.rs (removed dead comments, fixed OpenFlags)
- tests/storage.rs, tests/multi_source_integration.rs
- tests/e2e_full_integration.rs, tests/e2e_large_dataset.rs
- tests/e2e_search_index.rs, tests/streaming_index.rs
- tests/storage_migration_safety.rs, tests/cli_index.rs

cargo check --tests passes clean (0 errors).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
